name: Automatizacion gestion de valores mensuales version original

parameters.functionCode:
return [
  {
    json: {
      script: `SELECT DB_NAME() as entorno,
YEAR(T.Fecha) as ano,
MONTH(T.Fecha) as mes,
COUNT(C.CuitId) AS Emitidos
FROM Comprobante AS C WITH(NOLOCK)
  INNER JOIN rol 
    ON C.CuitId = Rol.CuitId 
   AND C.RolEmisorId = Rol.RolId 
   AND Rol.TipoRol = 1
  INNER JOIN Transaccion AS T 
    ON T.CuitId = C.CuitId 
   AND T.TransaccionId = C.TransaccionId
WHERE C.Resultado <> 'R'
  AND YEAR(T.Fecha) = YEAR(GETDATE())
GROUP BY YEAR(T.Fecha), MONTH(T.Fecha)
ORDER BY entorno, ano, mes`
    }
  }
];
